display.purpose: Landing hero headline only. Appears once per page.

title.purpose: Dashboard section headers, one notch quieter than a landing Headline.

body.purpose: Lead paragraphs and descriptive copy; dashboard body runs smaller for density.

label.purpose: Kickers, eyebrows, KPI captions, tag chips. The system's only uppercase-tracked text.

shadows.name: ambient-rest
shadows.purpose: Default lift under every card and elevated panel at rest.

shadows.name: ambient-hover
shadows.purpose: Firmer, deeper lift on hover/focus, paired with a small translateY(-2px).

shadows.name: glow-primary
shadows.purpose: Reserved for the primary CTA button only.

shadows.name: glow-accent
shadows.purpose: Reserved for the NVIDIA benchmark number and other Photon Green moments.

motion.name: ease-reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-reveal entrance easing: opacity + translateY + blur.

motion.name: ease-lift
motion.purpose: Hover-lift easing for buttons and interactive cards.

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-reveal entrance duration on the landing page (0.8s on the dashboard).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one CTA color in the system. Glows at rest, lightens and lifts on hover.

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action: glass fill, hairline border, no glow at rest.

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: The system's signature surface: flat glass with a lit top-edge, lifted by ambient shadow on hover, never colored shadow.
components.html:
Air Safety Score
Delhi is Hazardous today

components.name: Live Status Chip
components.description: Glass pill with the system's one animated indicator, reserved for genuinely live data.
components.css: .ds-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 16px;border-radius:99px;font-size:13px;color:#a9b4d0;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09);font-family:Inter,-apple-system,sans-serif}.ds-chip-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:#9adb3f;animation:ds-pulse 1.8s infinite}@keyframes ds-pulse{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(154,219,63,.5)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 9px rgba(154,219,63,0)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(154,219,63,0)}}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){.ds-chip-dot{animation:none}}

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Glass input, focus ring replaced by a border-color shift to stay in the restrained register.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Ask about air quality, health risk, timing, hotspots…">

components.name: Floating Nav
components.description: The signature centered glass pill nav bar with a conic-gradient logo mark.
components.html:
VayuSense
WhyHow it works

components.name: Score Ring
components.description: The product's one true hero metric: an animated SVG gauge, Ice-to-Ultraviolet gradient stroke.
components.html: 75out of 100

components.name: Chat Bubbles
components.description: User messages carry the AI-moment gradient tint; agent replies stay flat and neutral even for hazardous verdicts.
components.html:
Is it safe for outdoor sports today?
Not safe. PM2.5 is 15.6× the WHO 24-hour guideline and rising.

narrative.overview: VayuSense is a vigilant, quiet monitoring system, not a marketing dashboard. The whole surface reads as an instrument kept on through the night: a deep navy-black field, particles drifting like slow static, a soft aurora that answers the cursor rather than announcing itself, and a single glowing ring at the center that reports one number a person can trust. Nothing here performs urgency; the interface stays still and lets the data carry the weight. When a reading is hazardous, the number itself lands hard, not the chrome around it. This system explicitly rejects the generic SaaS dashboard: no hero-metric-card cliche, no gradient text as decoration, no side-stripe accent borders, no identical card grids repeated for their own sake, no cookie-cutter admin template layout.
keyCharacteristics: Deep, near-black night backgrounds with drifting particulate haze and a cursor-reactive aurora glow
One primary accent (Ice) doing the CTA/focus work, Ultraviolet reserved for AI/agent moments, Photon Green reserved for the acceleration story
Flat glass surfaces at rest, lifted by soft ambient shadow and a firmer glow on interaction, never shadow-heavy by default
A single Inter type family carried across every size, weight doing the hierarchy work instead of font-mixing
Restrained motion: reveal-on-scroll, gentle hover lifts, a pulsing status dot; nothing choreographed or bouncy

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Photon Green means acceleration and only acceleration. Ultraviolet means the AI is reasoning and only that. Reusing either color for an unrelated purpose breaks the vocabulary the whole product depends on.

rules.name: The Status-Plus-Label Rule
rules.body: Alert Rose, Amber Caution, and Signal OK never carry meaning by hue alone; every status color ships with a text label or icon alongside it.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Every weight and size on screen comes from Inter. Introducing a second family (even a "just for headlines" serif) breaks the calibrated-instrument read.

rules.name: The Two-Vocabulary Rule
rules.body: Ambient shadows convey structure (this thing is raised off the surface). Glows convey significance (this specific number matters). Never use a glow to fake structural depth, and never use an ambient shadow to try to draw attention to a value.

dos: Do keep every screen to one dominant accent (Ice Solid) with Ultraviolet and Photon Green appearing only in their named contexts (agent moments, acceleration moments).
Do give cards real ambient lift (Ambient Rest/Hover) now that the system has moved past flat-only; keep that lift dark and diffuse, never colored.
Do pair every status color (Alert Rose, Amber Caution, Signal OK) with a text label or icon.
Do use Inter at every size; let weight and tracking carry hierarchy.
Do keep motion restrained: reveal-on-scroll, hover lifts, one pulsing status dot; always ship a prefers-reduced-motion alternative.
donts: Don't ship a generic SaaS dashboard: no hero-metric-card cliche, no gradient text as decoration, no side-stripe colored borders on cards or callouts, no identical repeated card grids, no cookie-cutter admin template layout.
Don't make this look like a government/bureaucratic data portal: no dense unstyled tables, no default form-control chrome, no bureaucratic labeling.
Don't make this look like a consumer weather app: no cartoonish icons, no playful illustration style, no rounded-mascot AQI badges.
Don't use a glow to fake structural depth, or an ambient shadow to fake significance; the two vocabularies stay separate.
Don't introduce a second type family "just for headlines"; Inter carries the whole system.
Don't rely on color alone for hazardous/safe/caution states.
